message:
perf(mvcc): compound page-state helper for VDBE read hot path

The VDBE `SharedTxnPageIo::read_page` / `read_page_data` impls hit the
concurrent handle's `page_states` HashMap twice per read — once via
`concurrent_page_is_freed` and again via `concurrent_read_page` — to
answer the is-freed predicate and fetch the own-write staged bytes.
Both probes key on the same `PageNumber` and run back-to-back under the
same handle lock.

Add:
- `concurrent_page_read_state(handle, page) -> (bool, Option<PageData>)`
  — single `page_states.get(&page)` that returns both is_freed and the
  cloned staged_data.
- `concurrent_has_page_state(handle)` — O(1) empty-check so callers can
  skip the compound probe entirely on read-only transactions (where
  `page_states` is empty).

VDBE engine wiring is a separate commit; `crates/fsqlite-vdbe/src/engine.rs`
is currently reserved by FrostyLynx via MCP Agent Mail until ~06:11 UTC.
This commit lands the MVCC-side helper and its microbench so the wiring
patch can be small and land immediately once the reservation expires.

Before: 4.2 ns/probe (two-lookup pattern used today by VDBE)
After:  3.7 ns/probe (single compound lookup)
Delta:  -12.3% per read probe (median of 7 trials, ±1% variance,
        200,000 reads/trial, 64 staged pages, alternating hit/miss)
Bench:  bench_read_path_page_state_lookup (added here; in-process
        microbench directly comparing the two call patterns on the
        same handle state)
Cmd:    rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cc4_mvcc \
        cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc --lib --release \
        bench_read_path_page_state_lookup -- --ignored --nocapture

Projected real-workload impact: on an MT 8t read scan of N pages, this
saves ~N hash-and-probe operations per page (0.5 ns each) for an absolute
savings of ~0.5·N ns per thread — modest per statement, but compounds with
the read-only fast path (`concurrent_has_page_state` returns false on
pure-SELECT transactions, letting future callers skip the handle lookup
entirely).

Correctness: 71 begin_concurrent::tests pass, including SSI edge discovery.

Bead: bd-7h6o3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,9 +188,10 @@ pub use begin_concurrent::{
     ConcurrentHandle, ConcurrentPageState, ConcurrentRegistry, ConcurrentSavepoint, FcwResult,
     MAX_CONCURRENT_WRITERS, PreparedConcurrentCommit, SharedConcurrentHandle, SsiResult,
     concurrent_abort, concurrent_clear_page_state, concurrent_commit, concurrent_commit_with_ssi,
-    concurrent_free_page, concurrent_is_metadata_exempt, concurrent_mark_metadata_exempt,
-    concurrent_page_is_freed, concurrent_page_state, concurrent_prepare_write_page,
-    concurrent_read_page, concurrent_record_metadata_read, concurrent_restore_page_state,
+    concurrent_free_page, concurrent_has_page_state, concurrent_is_metadata_exempt,
+    concurrent_mark_metadata_exempt, concurrent_page_is_freed, concurrent_page_read_state,
+    concurrent_page_state, concurrent_prepare_write_page, concurrent_read_page,
+    concurrent_record_metadata_read, concurrent_restore_page_state,
     concurrent_rollback_to_savepoint, concurrent_savepoint, concurrent_stage_prepared_write_page,
     concurrent_track_write_conflict_page, concurrent_write_metadata_page, concurrent_write_page,
     finalize_prepared_concurrent_commit_with_ssi, is_concurrent_mode,
